subtasks.description: Extract licensed user counts and SKU assignments from Software Asset Management (SAM) system
Query consumption facts database for active users by SKU and usage metrics
Reconcile SAM licensed users against consumption facts active users, calculate under/over-provisioning variance, and classify licensing posture by product

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required for full reconciliation. (1) extract_sam (small): straightforward structured field extraction from SAM document. (2) query_consumption (mid): multi-table join across user activity and consumption facts requires aggregation by SKU and time windows. (3) cross_recon (mid): reconciliation of two sources with variance calculation and posture classification (under-provisioned, over-provisioned, optimized) requires moderate inference but no frontier-level complexity. No policy_action needed because licensing posture classification is analytical, not governance-gated approval. No multitool_plan needed—data sources are directly queryable.

output.sql: SELECT cf.product, cf.publisher, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) as active_users, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) as total_active_seats, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as total_spend_usd, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_date) as active_days, ROUND(SUM(cf.amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(cf.daily_active_seats), 0), 2) as cost_per_seat, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'Microsoft' AND cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY cf.product, cf.publisher, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year DESC, cf.fiscal_quarter DESC, total_spend_usd DESC

reconciled.reason: SAM extract returned null values - no licensed user counts, SKU assignments, or system data available
SQL consumption facts query is defined but upstream extract_sam pipeline produced no data; unable to execute reconciliation without SAM baseline
Cannot classify under/over-provisioning variance without licensed user counts from SAM and active user counts from consumption facts
MongoDB SAM extract is non-functional (all fields null); SQL consumption facts infrastructure exists but left join cannot proceed - primary source missing

reconciliation_summary.remediation_required: Verify SAM data extraction pipeline; check MongoDB connectivity and SAM system integration; validate sku_assignments, licensed_user_counts, and sam_system_data sources before re-attempting reconciliation
